notes: When I had my 8bitdo controller plugged in the view was constantly being pulled up, but I didn't run into any problems after unplugging the controller.
title: Conflict Desert Storm™

notes: Just launched without tweaks and it works great. No noticeable issues. Also, it runs better than in regular Wine due to the compositor as it's easier to alt+tab out of the game. Note: I highly recommend disabling mouse acceleration in the settings, since the default acceleration curve is insane.
title: Conflict Desert Storm™

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box.
title: Conflict Desert Storm™
